original_image_tags: The top right corner of the page has "4-22" printed. The document header is stamped and typed.

elements.description: A stamped and handwritten FBI form. Header text reads 'FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION RECORDS SECTION' with a stamped date '4/23, 1954'. The form contains typed options with checkboxes, several of which are checked or annotated with handwriting (e.g., 'Attention', 'Return to', 'Subversive References'). The subject line contains handwritten text. The bottom of the form features grid lines, the handwritten notation 'NR', and a vertical handwritten signature or initials. No photographs, sketches, or diagrams are present.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific verbatim text from a stamp ('4/23, 1954') and form fields not mentioned by Description A, which only describes the header area and '4-22', creating a factual inconsistency on quoted visual content.
